title: Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug,Self Stirring Mug With Lid Electric Mixing Cup USB Rechargeable Self Mixing Cup for Coffee Milk Tea Portable For Travel, Office,School (mint green)
description:
About this item
【Powerful Cooling and Stirring Function】The magnetic coffee stirrer mug provides a rapid cooling function, which uses advanced cooling technology to quickly reduce the drink from 85°C to 55°C, ensuring a better taste of the drink.The one-touch automatic stirring design easily mixes beverages in less than 30 seconds with the built-in magnetic stirring mechanism, for the perfect taste of both coffee and milk.
【Easy to Operate】User-friendly controls with an on/off switch allow for easy temperature regulation.Not only does this automatic stirring cup stir your beverages effortlessly, but it also offers convenience in various situations. USB Rechargeable, Whether you’re at home, in the office, or traveling, this Self Stirring Mug allows you to effortlessly mix hot or cold beverages. Just add your ingredients, press the button, and enjoy perfectly blended drinks anytime.
【Easy To Carry/Clean】The automatic mixing coffee cup is lightweight, easy to carry. Cleaning up after enjoying your favorite beverage is now simple and quick. It only needs to be cleaned with clean water, which is easy to clean. It can be used as a normal cup for drinking if you do not need stirring function.
【Widely used】This self stirring mug is Suitable for coffee, tea, hot chocolate, milk, protein shakes lemonade or other mixed drinks. Suitable for various occasions - home, travel, office, business, picnic, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Halloween, it is the best gift for family, friends and colleagues.
【High-quality materials】 The electric stirring coffee cup is made of 304 stainless steel and food-grade ABS plastic which is resistant to high temperatures and does not rust.Includes a USB charging cable for effortless power supply on-the-go or at home.
